category_sources: source_facts.description says official Outscale CLI for Outscale API; official OUTSCALE docs say OSC CLI manages OUTSCALE Cloud resources: https://docs.outscale.com/en/userguide/Installing-and-Configuring-OSC-CLI.html
display_name_sources: Official OUTSCALE docs and GitHub README call the tool OSC CLI / osc-cli: https://github.com/outscale/osc-cli
docs_sources: Official OUTSCALE public documentation has an Installing and Configuring OSC CLI page; official GitHub README lists docs/install and configuration/usage docs: https://docs.outscale.com/en/userguide/Installing-and-Configuring-OSC-CLI.html
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL; official Outscale GitHub org lists osc-cli as the official CLI: https://github.com/outscale/osc-cli
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official OUTSCALE docs describe a CLI for OUTSCALE API/cloud resource management.
